sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5653" key="a)mfa/kanqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφάκανθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ἄκανθα</etym>) <sense id="n5653.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">surrounded with prickles,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ. δέμας,</foreign> of the hedgehog, Ion Trag.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0719.tlg003.perseus-grc1:38" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
